name: French Omelette with Melted Cheese and Croutons
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Grated Gruyère or Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a 5-inch frying pan for a 3-egg omelette, or larger pans as needed.
2. Cut bread into small squares (about half to quarter inch).
3. Fry croutons in oil until golden; remove and set aside.
4. Wipe the pan clean and add butter.
5. Heat butter until it hisses.
6. Beat eggs in a bowl.
7. Pour beaten eggs into hot butter, scramble for about 1 minute.
8. Add cheese and sprinkle over croutons.
9. Season as desired.
10. Fold omelette with a palette knife or fork and transfer to a warm plate.
11. Serve immediately; the omelette will continue cooking slightly after removal.
